scope: Offline static parity for the canonical out-of-tree candidate; untested functions, scheduler timing and electrical behavior are excluded

comparisons.evidence: driver_audit_static_final.json records two clean reproducible builds, exact 152/152 imports, matching aliases and namespaces, accepted vermagic and a fresh candidate hash match
header_layout_probe.json compiles the platform_device and partial TCM static assertions with clang-r536225 against GKI 6.12.23
comparisons.note: The stock ELF independently records syna_spi_device size 0x3f0 and its release relocation at +0x338

comparisons.evidence: kcfi_direct_surface_final_comparison.json matches section and type ID for 151/151 selected functions, including 143/143 callbacks across all eight recovered families
comparisons.note: Function size is non-gating because the OEM LTO pipeline is unavailable

comparisons.evidence: reconstruction_map.json maps 367/367 Ghidra identities, including duplicate names by stock entry, to hash-bound source, P-Code, pseudocode and assembly
comparisons.note: Reviewed means structural identity only; semantic equivalence remains unproven per function

comparisons.evidence: symbol_inventory_kmi_exact_final.json records all 359 stock non-KCFI text symbols present and no missing or unexpected imports
comparisons.note: The 172 additional candidate symbols are classified as 131 decompiler subroutines, 22 signature wrappers, 9 renamed duplicates and 10 other helpers; their presence is documented and non-gating

comparisons.evidence: zlog_harness_report.json, remaining_harness_report.json and fw_callbacks_harness_report.json pass 27/27 tests over 38 distinct directly exercised reconstructed functions
comparisons.note: This comparison attests only the tested subset. The 367-function microtask gate remains INCOMPLETE and is not implied by this PASS

comparisons.evidence: No ADB, fastboot, insmod, rmmod, SPI, IRQ or partition operation was performed in this offline cycle
comparisons.note: Controlled NX809J hardware validation remains a separate gate

blockers: O6 has 38 hash-attested PASS microtasks and 329 tasks still requiring direct evidence
Controlled NX809J hardware validation is deferred
